inferred_primary_purpose: Turn a user goal into a bounded execution plan without silently inventing missing critical inputs.
preserved_user_visible_behaviors: Offer richer plan structure when the user explicitly asks for more depth or when the route is clearly strategic.
Prioritize practical next steps over abstract discussion.
required_structural_repairs: Separate routing, clarification, generation, and validation responsibilities.
Replace implicit strategic-vs-concise branching with explicit mode routing.
Replace "do your best with reasonable assumptions" with bounded clarification and explicit assumptions policy.
Define a ready-state contract instead of relying on "feels realistic".
conversion_risks: The source mixes public behavior with internal validation and escalation policy.
The source conflicts on when to ask clarification versus infer missing information.
The source implies a detailed strategic path without declaring an explicit trigger or mode contract.
Executive confidence notes are requested, but there is no rule for when assumptions are safe to expose versus when the workflow must block.
required_clarification_policy: Missing inputs that change scope, timeline, or success criteria are blocking.
A rushed tone must not override mandatory clarification for critical missing inputs.
User-visible assumptions are allowed only for non-critical gaps and must be labeled explicitly.
